title: Billing nightly batch times out in the Northwind test environment
environment: Northwind test env, Billing 4.1, migrated dataset 2026-05-27
description: During the first Billing dry-run on Northwind, the nightly invoice batch did not complete — it ran past the 2-hour window and was killed. It completes in ~35 minutes on-prem with the same dataset.
steps_to_reproduce: Restore the 2026-05-27 dataset into the Northwind test env
Trigger the nightly invoice batch manually
Observe runtime exceed 2 hours without completing
expected: Batch completes in roughly the on-prem time (~35 min).
actual: Batch runs >2h and is killed; no invoices produced.
